data.content: Implemented the create-more reset fix by removing early draft clearing and relationship-state resets from src/components/beat-form.tsx, then clearing the draft only inside the successful submitBeat callback in src/components/create-beat-dialog.tsx immediately before the keyed remount. Added src/components/__tests__/create-more-draft-reset.test.ts to lock the create-more callback ordering and title autofocus. Verified with bun run lint (existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build, and a Playwright smoke check on http://localhost:3001/beats that showed title, description, labels, and acceptance clearing, priority resetting from P1 to P2, and focus returning to the title input after a successful Create More submission.
